name: vaadin-skills
description: Skills and tools for building high-quality Vaadin 25 applications with Java, Flow, React, Hilla, Spring Boot, and the Vaadin MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Build, style, test, and secure Vaadin 25 applications.
interface.longDescription: Vaadin Skills gives Codex focused guidance for Vaadin 25 development, including Flow views, React/Hilla client-side views, layouts, theming, forms, data providers, security, testing, third-party components, and reactive state with Signals. It also configures the Vaadin MCP server for current documentation and API lookup.
defaultPrompt: Build a Vaadin 25 view with navigation.
Style this Vaadin UI with Aura or Lumo.
Write browserless tests for this Vaadin view.
